aesthetic: Technical military-inspired sportswear, fabric innovation through garment dyeing and special treatments, utilitarian precision with insider material knowledge, the Compass badge as a mark of applied craft credibility
clientele: fashion-literate men 22-42 with deep interest in technical fabric innovation and subcultural authenticity; values material insider knowledge over brand visibility, seeks the garment story and dyeing process over logo recognition
preferred_sources: football terrace culture and casual wear communities
brand_taboos: traditional luxury codes without technical grounding
clienteling_tone: peer-to-peer knowledge sharing, technically fluent on fabric and dyeing treatments, subcultural awareness — never patronising, always assume the client knows their garments, lead with material story not brand status
